name: qa-speckit-workflow
description: QA Spec-Kit Execution Workflow (V2, skill-based) — 15 owned QA skills (source-ingest → qa-retest) + 3 community helper skills (e2e-testing-patterns, playwright-generate-test, playwright-best-practices) + central HTML execution-report template. Self-contained: bundled qa-shared/ is provisioned into <project>/qa-shared/ (copy-if-missing) so relative refs work on any machine. Reads/writes QA artifacts under spec-kit/<feature>/qa/.
